title: Build parse benchmarks, stress tests, and memory soak tests
description: Benchmarks B1-B6 (parse, extract, dataflow, full pipeline, parser pool, inline overhead). Stress S1 (100 goroutines with race). Soak S2 (1M commands). Memory monitoring.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implemented n21.4 in commit 7ac608c: expanded B1-B6 benchmarks, added S1 concurrent stress test, added opt-in S2 memory soak test (DCG_RUN_SOAK=1). Validation run: go test -run TestConcurrentParsingStress ./internal/parse (pass), go test -race -run TestConcurrentParsingStress ./internal/parse (pass), go test -run '^$' -bench 'Benchmark(ParseLatency|ExtractLatency|DataflowResolution|FullPipeline|ParsePoolEffectiveness|InlineDetectionOverhead)$' -benchtime=1x ./internal/parse (pass). Full go test ./internal/parse currently has pre-existing non-n21.4 failures in golden/extraction inline suites after branch merge.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Approved by dcg-reviewer for commit 7ac608c. Closing task.
